creator: ken@pcbsd.org
text:
x11-fm/gnome-commander2 fails to start on amd64 (immediately throws a segmentation fault).
Tested on 2 separate amd64 systems for verification.

Fix: 

i386 build appears to work fine on other systems. Perhaps just list this port as i386 only?
How-To-Repeat: Build/install the x11-fm/gnome-commander2 port on an amd64 system, then run using the "gnome-commander" command.
